auto_filled._comment: Filled by tools/extract.ts (site) and tools/enrich-adv.ts (SEC IAPD). Don't edit by hand. NOTE: the IAPD auto-match returned a FALSE POSITIVE on this refresh — 'Asset Map' was matched against 'SUGAR MAPLE ASSET MANAGEMENT, LLC' (CRD 282632) due to a token-fuzz weakness in pickBestMatch (Asset/Asset + Map/Maple scored as 2/2). Asset-Map, Inc. is a B2B SaaS for financial advisors based in Philadelphia, PA — not an RIA — and is not in the IAPD database. The sec_iapd block is manually cleared below. Bug logged for pickBestMatch tightening: it should require exact token equality (or full-string-contains check) before claiming a confident match.

sec_iapd.note: Asset Map is a B2B SaaS, not an RIA. The pipeline's auto-match returned a false-positive against 'Sugar Maple Asset Management, LLC' — manually cleared on 2026-05-13.

manual._comment: Needs Form ADV Part 1A (deeper fields) or Part 2A (brochure). Pull from the adv_pdf_url above or from the IAPD profile page.
